# Snorlax / API v1

Base URL: `http://snorlax.example.com/v1`

## Channels

<details>
<summary><h3>GET /channels</h3></summary>

Available Request Parameters:
- `limit` (for pagination)
- `page` (for pagination)

Response Schema:

```json
{
    "code": 200,
    "data": {
        "items": [
            {
                "id": "UCxxxxxxxxxx",
                "handle": "@iiPythonx",
                "name": "iiPython",
                "subscribers": 0,
                "preferred_id": "@iiPythonx"
            }
        ],
        "total": 1
    }
}
```

</details>

<details>
<summary><h3>GET /channel/{id}</h3></summary>

Response Schema (Success):

```json
{
    "code": 200,
    "data": {
        "id": "UCxxxxxxxxxx",
        "handle": "@iiPythonx",
        "name": "iiPython",
        "subscribers": 0,
        "preferred_id": "@iiPythonx"
    }
}
```

Response Schema (Failure):

```json
{
    "code": 404,
    "data": {
        "message": "The specified channel does not exist."
    }
}
```

</details>

<details>
<summary><h3>DELETE /channel/{id}</h3></summary>

Response Schema (Success):

```json
{
    "code": 200
}
```

Response Schema (Failure):

```json
{
    "code": 404,
    "data": {
        "message": "The specified channel does not exist."
    }
}
```

</details>

## Videos

<details>
<summary><h3>GET /videos</h3></summary>

Available Request Parameters:
- `limit` (for pagination)
- `page` (for pagination)
- `channel_id` (for filtering)
- `query` (for searching)

Response Schema:

```json
{
    "code": 200,
    "data": {
        "items": [
            {
                "id": "xxxxxxxxxx",
                "title": "Example Video",
                "duration": 70,
                "view_count": 100000,
                "timestamp": 1700000000,
                "channel_id": "UCxxxxxxxxxx",
                "channel_name": "iiPython",
                "channel_preferred_id": "@iiPythonx",
                "available": true
            }
        ],
        "total": 1
    }
}
```

</details>

<details>
<summary><h3>GET /video/{id}</h3></summary>

Response Schema (success):

```json
{
    "code": 200,
    "data": {
        "id": "xxxxxxxxxx",
        "title": "Example Video",
        "duration": 70,
        "view_count": 0,
        "timestamp": 1700000000,
        "channel_id": "UCxxxxxxxxxx",
        "channel_name": "iiPython",
        "channel_preferred_id": "@iiPythonx",
        "available": true,
        "like_count": 0,
        "description": "This is an example video.",
        "caption_langs": ["en"],
        "chapters": [
            {
                "start_time": 0.0,
                "end_time": 60.0,
                "title": "Something"
            }
        ]
    }
}
```

Response Schema (Failure):

```json
{
    "code": 404,
    "data": {
        "message": "The specified video does not exist."
    }
}
```

</details>

<details>
<summary><h3>DELETE /video/{id}</h3></summary>

Response Schema (Success):

```json
{
    "code": 200
}
```

Response Schema (Failure):

```json
{
    "code": 404,
    "data": {
        "message": "The specified video does not exist."
    }
}
```

</details>

## Jobs

<details>
<summary><h3>GET /jobs</h3></summary>

Available Request Parameters:
- `limit` (for pagination)
- `page` (for pagination)

Response Schema:

```jsonc
{
    "code": 200,
    "data": {
        "items": [
            {
                "id": "xxxxxxxxxx",
                "title": "Example Video",
                "duration": 70,
                "timestamp": 1700000000,
                "channel_id": "UCxxxxxxxxxx",
                "channel_name": "iiPython",
                "channel_preferred_id": "@iiPythonx",
                "status": "finished",
                "progress": 50,
                "speed": 10,    // MiB/s
                "eta": 5,       // Seconds
                "error": null,  // Null, or a string with an error message
                "job_id": "aaaaaaaa-aaaa-aaaa-aaaa-aaaaaaaaaaaa",
                "available": false
            }
        ],
        "total": 1
    }
}
```

</details>

<details>
<summary><h3>POST /jobs/create</h3></summary>

Request Schema:

```json
{
    "url": "https://youtube.com/watch?v=abcd"
}
```

Response Schema:

```json
{
    "code": 200
}
```

</details>

<details>
<summary><h3>DELETE /jobs/{id}</h3></summary>

Response Schema (Success):

```json
{
    "code": 200
}
```

Response Schema (Failure):

```json
{
    "code": 404,
    "data": {
        "message": "The specified job does not exist."
    }
}
```

</details>
